query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_projetos FROM projects WHERE status = 'ativo';

SELECT p.nome, p.construtora, p.cidade, COUNT(l.id) as total_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN l.status='contrato_fechado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contratos
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.construtora IS NOT NULL AND p.construtora != 'NULL'
GROUP BY p.id, p.nome, p.construtora, p.cidade
HAVING total_leads > 0
ORDER BY contratos DESC, total_leads DESC
LIMIT 12;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_projetos FROM projects WHERE status = 'ativo';

SELECT p.nome, p.construtora, p.cidade, COUNT(l.id) as total_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN l.status='contrato_fechado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contratos
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.construtora IS NOT NULL AND p.construtora != 'NULL'
GROUP BY p.id, p.nome, p.construtora, p.cidade
HAVING total_leads > 0
ORDER BY contratos DESC, total_leads DESC
LIMIT 12;
